entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: generated dialogue ला authenticated quotation म्हणून कधीही present करू नका. harmful views sanitize करू नका किंवा oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism किंवा violence glorify करू नका. context ने excuse न करता clarify करावे. persona द्वारे medical, legal, financial किंवा harmful advice देऊ नका. historical person कडून learning आणि त्यांना endorsing यातला फरक preserve करा.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: future answers कधीही reveal करू नका. topic ला advanced challenge लागेल तेव्हाच trick questions वापरा.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Terms मध्ये set forth केलेल्या कोणत्याही term किंवा condition वर Company ने waiver दिला तरी तो त्या term किंवा condition चा further किंवा continuing waiver किंवा इतर term किंवा condition चा waiver मानला जाणार नाही, आणि Terms अंतर्गत right किंवा provision assert करण्यात Company चे कोणतेही failure त्या right किंवा provision चा waiver ठरणार नाही. competent jurisdiction असलेल्या court किंवा other tribunal ने Terms मधील कोणतीही provision invalid, illegal किंवा unenforceable धरल्यास, ती provision eliminate केली जाईल किंवा minimum extent पर्यंत limited केली जाईल, जेणेकरून Terms मधील remaining provisions full force आणि effect मध्ये continue राहतील.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: नाही. Public pages indexable आहेत, पण private saved chats sitemap, llms files किंवा AI content index मध्ये included नाहीत.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: नाही. comparison फक्त public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries आणि learning paths शी link करते. Private saved conversations source content म्हणून वापरल्या जात नाहीत.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: नाही. comparison pages live AI tutoring, prompts आणि guest learning modes साठी inspir कधी better first click आहे आणि structured curriculum किंवा official course library कधी still useful असू शकते हे दाखवण्यासाठी लिहिल्या आहेत.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: नाही. त्या फक्त public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts आणि learning paths शी link करतात. Private saved chats discovery surfaces बाहेर राहतात.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: नाही. generated dialogue ला learning simulation माना. factual claims साठी real primary किंवा secondary sources cite करा.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: प्रत्येक learning need साठी नाही. Khan Academy structured lessons आणि practice साठी useful आहे. learner ला काम करत असलेल्या exact गोष्टीभोवती live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback किंवा study workflow हवा असताना inspir useful आहे.

entries.value: आता open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints म्हणून rebuilt.

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended आणि CCBot public discovery साठी allowed आहेत.

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: observe करा, describe करा, interpret करा, contextualize करा आणि personal response invite करा.

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: practical timer setup offer करा आणि session ला recall check सोबत pair करण्याची suggestion द्या.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: त्याच्या AI-powered tutor आणि teaching assistant साठी official Khan Academy page.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Official mission आणि subject coverage reference.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Cancellation Period संपल्यानंतर, तुम्ही subscription cancel करण्याचा निर्णय घेतला तरी Tao subscription fee refund करणार नाही. cancellation request करण्यासाठी, तुम्ही Tao customer care शी contact करणे किंवा support@inspir.app वर email address करणे आवश्यक आहे. तुम्ही subscription cancel करण्याचा option घेतल्यानंतर subscription features चा access राहणार नाही.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: एक AI learning system, अनेक school jobs.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: modes, prompts, paths आणि guides साठी एक map.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners करत असलेली एक mistake म्हणजे प्रत्येक card सारखेच treat करणे. card तुम्हाला instantly येत असेल तर उद्या पुन्हा review करणे वेळ वाया घालवू शकते. card miss झाले तर weekभर थांबणे खूप long ठरू शकते.

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: {value1} उघडा आणि guide ला live tutoring session मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: public guest experience साठी account न लागता mode उघडा आणि लगेच सुरू करा.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: public mode उघडा, student behavior test करा आणि ते योग्यरीत्या asks, hints, quizzes किंवा critiques करते का inspect करा.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: एआय (AI) सहकाऱ्यासोबत एक सामायिक कार्यक्षेत्र उघडा. एक कच्चा मसुदा तयार करा, संपादने करा, कमकुवत दुवे तपासा, निर्णय नोंदवा आणि ठोस प्रगतीसह पुढे जा.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: review आधी answer ला simpler model हवा असल्यास Learn Anything उघडा.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Learn Anything उघडा, prerequisite ideas मागा, मग तुमचा model test करण्यासाठी Socratic Instruction मध्ये switch करा.

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: या category मागची AI learning tools उघडा.
